name: Mandarin Orange Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 can mandarin orange slices with juice
1 large can crushed pineapple with juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the cake mix, oil, eggs, and mandarin oranges and juice. Form into 3 layers.
2. Bake at 375 degrees F (190 degrees C) for 25 minutes.
3. For the filling, beat the Cool Whip by hand until stiff peaks form.
4. Spread the filling between the layers, on top of the cake, and sides of the cake.
5. Keep refrigerated.
